activity.name: Fingerprints
activity.screen: Place the matches in the fuming chamber.
Add Superglue to the warming tray.
Place the warming tray on the hot plate inside the fuming chamber.
Close the door and turn on the machine.
The bottom of the machine serves as the hot plate, and it heats up to the appropriate temperature.
Drag a fingerprint to a "Viewing area" to begin.

popup.title: IAFIS
popup.desc: The Integrated Automated Fingerprint Identification System (IAFIS) is the FBI's national fingerprint database. It contains over 470,000,000 fingerprints. On average, it takes about two hours to search the entire database.

screen.name: screen8
screen.text: Select a second fingerprint for comparison.

popup.title: Match Detected!
popup.desc:
Name: Donald Parker
Occupation: Waiter
Address: 837 Harborough Street, Las Vegas, NV Fingerprint Source: Arrest for first degree assault on Feb. 14, 2003
